challenge: Managing payroll for 4,200 employees across 180+ branches nationwide with varying schedules, holiday pay, and government compliance was taking the HR team 12 days per payroll cycle.
solution: Deployed HRISPH across all entities with biometric integration, automated SSS/PhilHealth/Pag-IBIG computation, and one-click BIR Form 2316 generation for year-end filing.
quote: The 13th month pay calculation used to take us a week across all branches. Now it's one click. BIR Form 2316 generation is completely seamless.

challenge: As a BSP-regulated bank, BDO required enterprise-grade audit trails, data privacy compliance (RA 10173), and strict role-based access control for 22,000 employees across the Philippines.
solution: Implemented HRISPH Enterprise with full audit logging, data residency configuration, SSO integration with their existing Active Directory, and a dedicated compliance dashboard for HR audit requirements.
quote: Security and audit trails were non-negotiable for us as a bank. This system delivers enterprise-grade security with complete visibility into every data access.

location: Mall of Asia Complex, Pasay City
challenge: SM Prime manages 15,000+ employees across mall operations, real estate, and hospitality — each entity with different pay structures, benefits, and government ID remittance schedules.
solution: Multi-entity setup with consolidated reporting, unified government contribution management, and a custom employee portal deployed to all SM properties nationwide.
quote: Hindi ko akalaing makakahanap ng Philippine HRIS na kaya ng enterprise-level requirements namin. The multi-company feature alone justified the switch.
